use_cases: Displaying real-time user or team member locations with live timezone information
Showing current local time for distributed team members in collaboration tools
Adding location context to user profiles in SaaS applications
ai_summary: A compact location tag component that displays city, country, and live local time with a pulsing green indicator. Features smooth slide-up animations on hover to reveal location details, subtle shadow effects, and a semi-transparent rounded pill design. The live time updates every second using React hooks, making it ideal for displaying team member timezones or location context in collaborative applications.
